runtimeNotes: The active PNG atlas covers track parts with transparent sprites, exposes hull as sprite.hull, turret/coax as sprite.turret, and main cannon as sprite.barrel. The barrel sprite uses tintSlot team, matching the hull's full owner-color tint while preserving part.barrel recoil. Unlike pass 09, the source sheet has no visible guide boxes or grid lines, and atlas sizing comes from visible alpha bounds only.
notes: Regenerated from a no-guide 2x3 sheet using the attached top-down Tiger I reference as the subject input. This pass validates the no-guide pipeline and avoids baked guide artifacts, but it is not final art: the generated hull still carries rear/side fixtures from the reference that may read as unwanted track hardware in-game.
